title: leontodon eriopus
intro: Leontodon eriopus, also known as Autumn Hawkbit, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Leontodon eriopus can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal uses, although its effectiveness and safety should be evaluated by a healthcare professional before consumption.
